creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
#TravelDiary: Our first flight after 3 years!

Destination: 🏠🇵🇭 of course!

#StoryTime 
After a busy start of the year, Ed and I spontaneously decided to take a proper break. Last minute flight booking was a bit of a challenge. The most reasonable one in terms of price and timings was @cathaypacific. 

Here’s a quick flight review (I miss doing this! 😀):
🎟️ Layover duration options upon booking. I chose the 2-hour layover as we want to reach home asap.
🍛 Good inflight meal. I was surpised to find kare-kare on the dinner menu.
🎬 Nice selection of movies and tv shows. I watched Crazy Rich Asians for the nth time, and a performance of BTS in a Korean music show. 
✈️ Comfy seats, ample leg room

Anyways, we’re so happy to be home and we’re excited to share snippets of our beloved Philippines on the grid. What do you want me to share? Attractions? Food? Let me know in the comments. 😃

#CathayPacific #Dubai #HongKong #Manila #ladyandhersweetescapes #dubaiblogger #uaeblogger #travelblogger #pinayblogger #mydubai #dubai #visitdubai #dametraveler #DubaiReels #travelvlog

transcription.text: Travel with me to Manila. But first things first, coffee. We flew via Cathay Pacific so we had a quick layover in Hong Kong. Guess what served for dinner? It's Filipino Kare-kare and it's really good. I watched a feel-good movie while having ice cream, monitored the flight, and dozed off for a while. We reached Hong Kong at dawn, the shops were still closed so we lazed around the gates. Finally it's time to board our next flight. I had congee for breakfast then I finally got to see Manila skies. It was raining when we arrived but we're just so happy to be home after 3 long years.
